blockingIssues.description: decode_step_tree() falls back to standard causal attention instead of using tree attention mask. The TODO comment at line 3186 acknowledges this is incomplete.
flash_attn_tree.hip kernel is written but NOT compiled or integrated. Without this, tree attention cannot actually be used.
Attention seq_len calculation (kv_len + tree_idx + 1) is incorrect for tree attention - gives causal attention, not ancestor-only attention.
Validation uses MockEngine with time.sleep() simulated timing instead of real GPU execution. Cannot verify VAL-SPEC-005 (throughput improvement) with mock benchmarks.
No integration with DP tree optimizer. Feature description requires 'Use the DP-optimal tree topology from tree_optimizer' but implementation only has hardcoded topologies.
Mock-specific acceptance workaround at tree_speculative.py:276 forces acceptance when logits are small, artificially inflating acceptance rates.

nonBlockingIssues.description: RoPE positions hardcoded to 0 for all tree nodes
Naming collision: two classes named TreeTopology exist in tree_optimizer.py and tree_attention.py with different interfaces
generate() method doesn't update KV cache after accepting tokens

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary: gpu-kernel-worker features MUST run actual GPU validation on dev server before marking complete. Mock-based tests are insufficient for features that specify throughput or correctness requirements.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two features (tree-attention-infrastructure, ngram-tree-integration) skipped GPU execution. Both had validation requirements specifying real throughput measurements and correctness verification that cannot be satisfied with mocks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen Step 5-6 (dev server deployment/testing) to require actual GPU execution output in handoff.verification.commandsRun, not just mock test results.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Workers completed 'Deploy and build on dev server' steps but then ran mock-based tests locally instead of actual GPU benchmarks. The skill should explicitly require GPU execution evidence.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add naming convention to avoid duplicate class names across modules
rejectedObservations.reason: Too prescriptive - the TreeTopology naming collision is specific to this domain where both modules legitimately use the term. Better handled case-by-case.
